quizExercises.sentence: The government's donation to the disaster relief fund was generous, but given the scale of the crisis, it was ___.
quizExercises.explanation: 'A drop in the ocean' means an amount that is far too small to make a real difference to a large problem. (Lesson 6)

quizExercises.question: Which scenario best illustrates something happening 'out of the blue'?
options: A musician releases an album on the date they had announced months earlier
A former colleague calls after ten years of no contact to offer you a job
A company announces redundancies after a series of profit warnings
quizExercises.explanation: 'Out of the blue' means something unexpected that happens with no warning or prior indication. (Lesson 7)

quizExercises.sentence: He tends to ___ whenever someone challenges him in a meeting – it makes difficult conversations even harder.
quizExercises.explanation: 'Fly off the handle' means to suddenly become very angry and lose control of one's temper. (Lesson 8)

quizExercises.idiom: life and soul of the party
quizExercises.question: Which person is best described as the 'life and soul of the party'?
options: Someone who arrives late, sits quietly in the corner, and leaves early
Someone who tells funny stories, dances, and keeps everyone entertained all evening
Someone who organises the event but stays behind the scenes all night
quizExercises.explanation: 'Life and soul of the party' describes someone who is lively, entertaining, and makes social events enjoyable for everyone. (Lesson 9)

quizExercises.sentence: Starting a business abroad was more difficult than expected because of all the ___ involved in getting the necessary licences.
quizExercises.explanation: 'Red tape' refers to excessive bureaucratic rules and procedures that cause frustrating delays. (Lesson 10)

quizExercises.question: Which of the following is an example of 'keeping something under your hat'?
options: Posting about a surprise party on social media before it happens
Telling the whole office about a colleague's promotion before HR makes the announcement
Knowing that your friend is expecting a baby but not mentioning it until they announce it themselves
quizExercises.explanation: 'Keep something under your hat' means to keep information secret and not tell anyone. (Lesson 11)

quizExercises.sentence: Since the warning from his doctor, he's really decided to ___ – he's exercising, eating well, and sleeping better.
quizExercises.explanation: 'Turn over a new leaf' means to start behaving in a better or more responsible way. (Lesson 12)

quizExercises.question: Which environment is most likely to be described as a 'concrete jungle'?
options: A coastal village with stone cottages, a harbour, and rolling green hills
A city neighbourhood dominated by high-rise blocks, motorways, and car parks with no parks or trees
A new eco-development with solar panels, community gardens, and cycle paths
quizExercises.explanation: 'Concrete jungle' describes a dense, unattractive urban environment with many large buildings and no greenery. (Lesson 13)
